title: Authentication
summary: Sign-in, sign-up, email verification, password reset and OTP. The gate in front of the whole portal.

title: Portfolio
summary: Cross-site rollups: energy KPIs, triage and irradiation across every site a company owns.

title: Site
summary: Per-site workspace: live view, channels, energy model, hardware services and field setup.

title: Status
summary: Health and connectivity views at site, portfolio and channel level.

title: Analytics
summary: Energy accounting and performance analytics for a single site or the whole portfolio.

title: Tests
summary: Capacity tests, benchmark alignment and other commissioning checks.

title: Field Setup
summary: Gateway provisioning, networking info and installation verification in the field.

title: Settings
summary: Company, user, and hardware administration — including cell-modem plan management.

title: Channels
summary: The data streams from site hardware — Deno sensors, gateways, Modbus/OPC devices, modems — and the Modbus template library.

title: Events
summary: The site timeline: alarms, maintenance records, notes, tickets and flags, with comments and acknowledgment.

title: Alarm Config
summary: The catalog of alarm types, severities and thresholds that incoming alarm events are classified by.

title: Notifications
summary: In-app notification bell and system-wide broadcast banners; company settings drive alarm delivery.

title: Webhooks
summary: Inbound integrations: HubSpot CRM sync and the alarm-dispatch pipeline that fans out emails and notifications.

title: Reports
summary: Scheduled fleet and site reports — templates, KPI columns, Excel rendering and email delivery.

title: Data Out (API)
summary: The raw and rollup time-series collections, the public customer data API (API key + IP whitelist), and live data feeds.

title: Metrics
summary: The catalog of measured quantities — names, units, KPI flags — with per-company display-name translation.

title: Device Types
summary: The read-only taxonomy of supported hardware, keyed by channel-id prefix.

title: Assets
summary: The physical hardware inventory — sensors, gateways, modems, radios — with serials, calibration records and SIM details.

title: Site Builder
summary: The drag-and-drop canvas for laying out a site's topology, deployed onto channels as their site-map positions.

title: Storage (Denobox)
summary: Each site's private file area — photos, reports, capacity-test files — with short-lived download links.

title: Quotes
summary: Sales quotation management — single, bulk and group quotes, auto-pricing, renewals and e-signature.

title: Companies
summary: The tenant boundary: each company owns sites and users, with billing, API keys, verified domains and notification settings.

title: Users
summary: User accounts, the role levels, account states and company scoping.

title: Activity Logs
summary: The automatic, append-only audit trail of every create, update and delete across the platform.

title: Status Logs
summary: The platform-infrastructure health log behind System Status and the public status page.

title: Agenda (Jobs)
summary: The background job scheduler — today, scheduled report generation and delivery.

title: Prompts (AI)
summary: A feedback store for AI chat exchanges — an in-progress feature not yet surfaced in the portal.

title: Solar Glossary
summary: The domain vocabulary — irradiance, POA, EPI, capacity tests, channels and more, defined in one place.
